text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #3)

I wait for bug 259787 to resolve, e.g. there were reports of devel/ninja not building (I wasn't affected due to ninja=samurai); once bug 259787 is fixed after pressure from maintainers or once related fixes to ports land, I'll understand what the community decided about 259787 and what to do.
